hero.headline: SSODL Online MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: Symbiosis International University's fully-online MBA with a Logistics and Supply Chain Management specialisation. NIRF #24 University, NAAC A++, UGC-DEB approved. Rs 55,000 work-experience scholarship for 2+ year professionals. Supply Chain Strategy, Warehouse Management, Technology in Supply Chain, Lean Six Sigma, and Sustainable Supply Chain in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: SSODL Online MBA Logistics and SCM: Symbiosis brand (NIRF #24, NAAC A++), Rs 55K work-experience scholarship, supply chain depth with Warehouse Management, SCM Strategy, Technology in SC, Lean Six Sigma, SC Modelling and Sustainable SC. Fees Rs 3.15L with scholarship, Rs 3.70L standard. Unique sustainable supply chain subject not found in most peer specs.

about.body:
The SSODL Online MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management is offered by Symbiosis School for Online and Digital Learning, the fully-online arm of Symbiosis International University (SIU), Pune. SSODL received UGC-DEB approval in 2020-21.

SIU carries NAAC A++ accreditation and NIRF #24 University ranking (2025). This specialisation covers the full logistics and supply chain stack: Supply Chain Management, Warehouse Management, Supply Chain Strategy, Technology in Supply Chain, International Logistics, Lean Six Sigma, Supply Chain Modelling and Design, and Sustainable Supply Chain in Sem 3-4.

The Sustainable Supply Chain subject is a differentiator: few online MBA logistics specialisations include ESG-linked supply chain content. Combined with Technology in Supply Chain and AI and ML for Business Management in the core, SSODL Logistics and SCM graduates are positioned for both traditional supply chain management roles and emerging tech-enabled and sustainable logistics careers.

sem3Subjects.name: Project I (4 Credits)
sem3Subjects.description: Conduct a structured supply chain research project on inventory optimisation, logistics cost reduction, or 3PL management.

sem3Subjects.name: Corporate Governance and Ethics
sem3Subjects.description: Apply ESG standards to supply chain sourcing decisions, supplier code of conduct, and responsible logistics practices.

sem3Subjects.name: Crisis Management in Business
sem3Subjects.description: Manage supply chain disruption: port strikes, raw material shortages, and natural disaster-driven logistics recovery.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Design supply chain network strategy: sourcing footprint, make-vs-buy, and global distribution network planning.

sem3Subjects.name: AI and ML for Business Management
sem3Subjects.description: Apply AI-driven demand forecasting, ML-based inventory replenishment, and autonomous supply chain decision-making concepts.

sem3Subjects.name: Supply Chain Management
sem3Subjects.description: Apply integrated supply chain frameworks: SCOR model, demand-supply synchronisation, and supply chain risk management.

sem3Subjects.name: Warehouse Management
sem3Subjects.description: Design warehouse layout, manage WMS implementation, and optimise pick-pack-ship operations for e-commerce and manufacturing.

sem3Subjects.name: Supply Chain Strategy
sem3Subjects.description: Build supply chain network design, sourcing strategy, and long-range supply chain transformation roadmaps.

sem3Subjects.name: Technology in Supply Chain
sem3Subjects.description: Evaluate RFID, IoT, blockchain, and supply chain visibility platforms for digital supply chain management.

sem4Subjects.name: Project II (10 Credits)
sem4Subjects.description: Complete a full supply chain management dissertation applying logistics strategy or network design theory to a real case.

sem4Subjects.name: Entrepreneurship
sem4Subjects.description: Build a logistics startup strategy: last-mile delivery model, 3PL marketplace design, or supply chain SaaS business plan.

sem4Subjects.name: Global Business Environment
sem4Subjects.description: Analyse global trade disruptions, geopolitical supply chain risks, and international logistics cost drivers.

sem4Subjects.name: Conflict and Negotiation
sem4Subjects.description: Negotiate 3PL contracts, carrier rate agreements, and vendor SLAs for logistics and supply chain roles.

sem4Subjects.name: Doing Business in India
sem4Subjects.description: Navigate India's GST impact on logistics, GST e-waybill compliance, warehousing policy, and road freight regulations.

sem4Subjects.name: Business Transformation and Organizational Turnaround
sem4Subjects.description: Lead supply chain transformation: 3PL consolidation, network redesign, and digital supply chain implementation.

sem4Subjects.name: International Logistics
sem4Subjects.description: Manage cross-border freight forwarding, customs clearance, incoterms, and international distribution network design.

sem4Subjects.name: Lean Six Sigma
sem4Subjects.description: Apply Green Belt level DMAIC tools to supply chain waste elimination, process standardisation, and logistics cost reduction.

sem4Subjects.name: Supply Chain Modeling and Design
sem4Subjects.description: Build supply chain network models, optimise facility locations, and design multi-echelon inventory systems.

sem4Subjects.name: Sustainable Supply Chain
sem4Subjects.description: Apply ESG principles, carbon footprint reduction, circular supply chain design, and responsible sourcing frameworks.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all SSODL MBA specialisations. See the main SSODL Online MBA page for core subject list.

whoHires.body:
Logistics and Supply Chain Management MBA graduates from SSODL Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** E-commerce and quick-commerce logistics, FMCG supply chain, Manufacturing, 3PL and freight forwarding, Management consulting (supply chain practice)

**Entry-level roles:** Supply Chain Analyst, Logistics Manager, Procurement Manager, Warehouse Manager, 3PL Coordinator

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Supply Chain Manager, Head of Logistics, Procurement Head, Distribution Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Supply Chain, COO, Head of Procurement, Supply Chain Transformation Director

**Top hiring organisations:** Amazon India Logistics, Flipkart Supply Chain, Reliance Retail Supply Chain, HUL Supply Chain, Nestle Manufacturing, Mahindra Logistics, DHL India, Maersk India, Blue Dart, TCI Freight, Infosys Supply Chain Consulting

skills.body:
The SSODL Logistics and SCM specialisation builds skills that supply chain and logistics employers test at manager and director levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Supply Chain Strategy: SCOR model application, network design, demand-supply synchronisation, and supply chain risk management for strategic SCM roles
- Technology in Supply Chain: RFID, IoT, blockchain, and supply chain visibility platform evaluation for digital supply chain transformation
- Supply Chain Modelling and Design: multi-echelon inventory modelling, facility location optimisation, and network design for COO-track roles
- Sustainable Supply Chain: ESG-linked sourcing frameworks, carbon footprint reduction, and circular supply chain design for responsible procurement roles

**Applied skills:**
- Warehouse Management: WMS implementation, warehouse layout design, and pick-pack-ship operations optimisation for e-commerce and manufacturing
- Lean Six Sigma: Green Belt DMAIC application, value stream mapping, and waste elimination for supply chain efficiency projects

**Soft skills:** Negotiating 3PL and carrier contracts, presenting supply chain analytics to the COO, building business cases for logistics technology investment, and managing cross-functional supply chain transformation programmes.

comparisons.body:
Comparing SSODL Online MBA Logistics and Supply Chain Management against peers:

**vs MUJ Online MBA Supply Chain Management:** MUJ is NAAC A+ and NIRF #58 at Rs 1,53,000-1,80,000. MUJ Supply Chain covers procurement, logistics, and supply chain strategy with Coursera Plus. SSODL Logistics and SCM adds Sustainable Supply Chain and Technology in Supply Chain as dedicated subjects and carries stronger Symbiosis brand recognition in Pune and western India supply chain hiring. For cost efficiency, MUJ is better. For Symbiosis brand in Maharashtra manufacturing sector, SSODL has an advantage.

**vs Amity Online MBA Production and Operations Management (covers SCM basics):** Amity Production and Operations covers supply chain as part of broader operations management. SSODL Logistics and SCM dedicates 8 Sem 3-4 subjects to supply chain and logistics, including dedicated Warehouse Management, SCM Strategy, Technology in SC, and Sustainable Supply Chain subjects. For specialised supply chain careers, SSODL is significantly more targeted, though Amity is more affordable.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Operations and Data Sciences Management:** NMIMS Ops and Data Sciences covers supply chain management and operations analytics. SSODL Logistics and SCM is broader in logistics specifics: Warehouse Management, Technology in SC, International Logistics, Supply Chain Modelling, and Sustainable Supply Chain as dedicated subjects. For analytics-led supply chain roles, NMIMS is more targeted. For logistics management breadth, SSODL has more coverage.

fees.body:
The SSODL Online MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management offers 2 fee tracks based on applicant work experience:

**Track 1 â€” Standard (under 2 years work experience)**:
- Application fee: Rs 1,000
- Registration fee: Rs 10,000 (one-time)
- Total program fee: Rs 3,70,000 across 4 semesters
- Semester breakdown: Rs 92,500 each for Sem 1-2 and Rs 87,500 each for Sem 3-4
- Year 1 total: Rs 1,95,000 (including Rs 10,000 registration)
- Year 2 total: Rs 1,75,000

**Track 2 â€” With Work Experience Scholarship (2+ years experience)**:
- Application fee: Rs 1,000
- Registration fee: Rs 10,000 (one-time)
- Total program fee: Rs 3,15,000 after Rs 55,000 experience-based scholarship
- Semester breakdown: Rs 80,000 each for Sem 1-2 and Rs 72,500 each for Sem 3-4
- Year 1 total: Rs 1,70,000
- Year 2 total: Rs 1,45,000

The Rs 55,000 experience scholarship applies whether you pay semester-wise or opt for one-time upfront payment. Submit 2+ years work experience proof during admission to claim.

EMI is available through the university's marketing partner. This is interest-bearing EMI, not zero-cost. Contact our counsellor for current EMI tenure options and approval terms.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with SSODL each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees and scholarship eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Symbiosis International University (SIU) and carries the SIU name with the MBA designation. The Logistics and Supply Chain Management specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from SSODL Online MBA Logistics and Supply Chain Management alumni. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Suresh Naik
items.liked: Warehouse Management and Technology in Supply Chain subjects were directly applicable to my 3PL management role. Sustainable Supply Chain gave me language and frameworks for ESG supply chain conversations with clients.
items.disliked: Supply Chain Modelling and Design could benefit from more Excel and software-based exercises.
items.body: I had 6 years in freight forwarding and wanted to move into supply chain management. SSODL's Symbiosis brand was immediately recognised at Pune-based FMCG and automotive companies. Rs 55K scholarship brought fees down significantly. Landed a Supply Chain Manager role within 3 months.

items.name: Tanvi Shah
items.liked: Supply Chain Strategy and Lean Six Sigma were excellent. R Programming in Sem 2 helped me build an inventory optimisation model that impressed my management.
items.disliked: Fees are higher than MUJ and Amity logistics options. Interest-bearing EMI adds cost over 2 years.
items.body: Good programme. Sustainable Supply Chain was unique and gave me an edge in interviews with FMCG companies focused on ESG reporting. Symbiosis brand worked well in Gujarat FMCG supply chain hiring.

items.name: Nitin Mishra
items.liked: International Logistics and Supply Chain Modelling subjects were strong.
items.disliked: Limited case study integration for e-commerce quick-commerce scenarios. Placement support was passive.
items.body: Good supply chain depth. For Delhi e-commerce operations roles, the Symbiosis brand is less differentiated. Better suited to Pune and Maharashtra manufacturing supply chain careers.

faqs.question: How does SSODL's work-experience scholarship work?
faqs.answer: Applicants with 2 or more years of documented work experience receive a Rs 55,000 scholarship off the standard Rs 3,70,000 program fee. The scholarship applies whether you pay semester-wise or in a single upfront payment. Submit proof of work experience during admission to have it applied automatically.

faqs.question: Is SSODL Online MBA the same as Symbiosis on-campus MBA?
faqs.answer: Both are awarded by Symbiosis International University. SSODL Online MBA is UGC-DEB approved and fully online. The SIU name appears on both certificates. Corporate employers treat UGC-DEB approved online MBAs as equivalent for hiring eligibility.

faqs.question: Does SSODL offer no-cost EMI?
faqs.answer: No. SSODL EMI is interest-bearing and routed through the university's marketing partner. MUJ and NMIMS offer zero-cost EMI. Factor in EMI interest cost when comparing total programme cost.

faqs.question: Is Sustainable Supply Chain a dedicated subject in SSODL Logistics and SCM?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sustainable Supply Chain is a dedicated Sem 4 subject covering ESG-linked sourcing, carbon footprint reduction, circular supply chain design, and responsible procurement frameworks. This is uncommon in peer online MBA logistics specialisations and reflects growing employer demand for ESG-aware supply chain management skills.

faqs.question: Is the SSODL Logistics and SCM MBA relevant for e-commerce operations roles?
faqs.answer: Yes. Warehouse Management, Technology in Supply Chain, and International Logistics subjects are directly applicable to e-commerce and quick-commerce fulfilment roles. The AI and ML for Business Management core subject also covers AI-driven demand forecasting and autonomous inventory replenishment relevant to e-commerce operations.

chooseIf: You want the Symbiosis brand for supply chain management, logistics, and procurement roles in Pune-region manufacturing and FMCG supply chains.
You have 2+ years work experience and the Rs 55,000 scholarship reduces effective fees to Rs 3.15L.
You want Sustainable Supply Chain coverage as a differentiated subject for ESG-linked supply chain careers.
consider: If fee is the primary concern, MUJ Online MBA Supply Chain Management (Rs 1.53L-1.80L with Coursera Plus) and Amity Online MBA Production and Operations Management (Rs 2.25L) offer more affordable alternatives.
If data-driven supply chain analytics is the primary focus, NMIMS Online MBA Operations and Data Sciences Management offers deeper analytics coverage.
If zero-cost EMI matters, MUJ and NMIMS offer zero-cost EMI; SSODL does not.
